artifacts.role: versioned study synthesis and approved bounded promotion register
sanitized 78-entry catalog and legacy reachability sidecar

redactions: Cursor referral identifier replaced with REDACTED
excludedFromCommit: downloaded site HTML, JavaScript, media, and bundles
cookies, local storage, session storage, and auth/session exports
personal data and secret, opaque, or non-public referral identifiers

retention.committedScope: sanitized authoring evidence only; never packaged with frontend-design
retention.rule: Committing, sharing, extending retention, and deleting local evidence each require separate owner approval.

limitations.detail: Utility and Productivity account for 46 of 78 entries; this is not a category-neutral market sample.
Four observations lack comparable full visual evidence; two retain structure/assets only and two have material visual gaps.
The three audit shards use different schemas and unmatched desktop viewport metadata; shard 27-52 has no embedded audit date.
Auth, session, referral, consent, overlay, and entry context changed several observed surfaces and are separate from transport reachability.
Capture context is Bangkok-only; one destination resolved to a region-unavailable surface.
The retrospective study had no predeclared strata, admissibility target, quiet window, independence plan, or batch novelty ledger.
Third-party screenshots, DOM snapshots, and source snapshots remain ignored local evidence and are unavailable from a fresh clone.
The CSV reachability column is a preserved mixed-dimension note; use this manifest's transport and access-constraint fields for normalized interpretation.
